cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need a private room or a terrace table for 10 people this Saturday night. Do you still have space?

mustInclude: acknowledge booking intent
ask for branch and exact time
guide toward the next reservation step naturally

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Taking my parents and a child there this weekend. What should we order if we do not want it too spicy?

mustInclude: recognize the mixed family group
anchor the reply in flavor preference
guide toward one practical next detail such as party size or preferred style

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: It is our first time there and my parents are older. Do we have to grill it ourselves or can the kitchen handle most of it?
negative_patterns: assuming every branch uses the same setup
pushing a premium platter before answering
context_window: user is planning the actual visit

mustInclude: acknowledge the comfort concern
mention that branch format can matter
ask for branch or dining context as the next step
mustAvoid: pretending the answer is identical everywhere

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every barbecue place online says the charcoal flavor is authentic. Why should I believe yours is any different?
context_window: user is skeptical but still engaged

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite a concrete flavor or quality concern
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: If I come at 8 tonight can you guarantee there will be no wait?

mustInclude: acknowledge the wish to avoid wasting a trip
state that queue depends on branch traffic and party size
guide toward reservation or sharing branch and time details

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My child has a sesame allergy. Can you guarantee there will be zero cross-contact on the grill?

mustInclude: treat the concern as serious
avoid making a guarantee
move toward exact allergen confirmation and human or branch review

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need a team dinner for 18 people next Wednesday and an invoice. Do you have a private area and a less smoky option?

mustInclude: recognize this as a business meal
ask for branch, time, and seating preference
guide toward a clear booking follow-up
mustAvoid: assuming every branch supports the same arrangement

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: Our barbecue delivery arrived cold and one skewer tray is missing. Is this how you handle orders?

mustInclude: empathy first
request order time or order details through DM
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I use this beer-and-skewer combo coupon tonight at your downtown branch?
context_window: user may be close to dining

mustInclude: acknowledge the offer question
mention that coupon rules can depend on branch and time
guide toward confirming branch and dining time

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We are 8 people. What is the cheapest way to eat there? I do not care about anything fancy.

mustInclude: respect the budget focus
explain that the workable range still depends on protein mix or drinks
reframe toward one or two trade-offs

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: Is your lamb absolutely fresh and never frozen? I only want the safest option.

mustInclude: acknowledge the ingredient concern
avoid making an absolute freshness or safety claim
guide toward exact item and branch confirmation

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: My parents hate smoky clothes. Do you have an outdoor table or a better-ventilated area for tonight?

mustInclude: validate the comfort concern
mention that branch and time can matter
ask for branch or arrival time as the next step

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Are you open after midnight on Qingming evening, and should I book ahead?

mustInclude: acknowledge the planning question
mention that holiday timing can vary by branch
guide toward branch and arrival time details
mustAvoid: fixed holiday answer without branch context

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to confirm the booking now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request branch plus booking details as the next action
mustAvoid: replying only with DM me and no context
